---
title: "🧮 Fundamentals"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Tensors, classical ML, training, architectures, and vision - the building blocks everything else in this site stands on.

::: {.grid .home-cards}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### [🔢 Tensors](notes/fundamentals/tensors/index.qmd)
Strides, views, broadcasting, and the memory model underneath every tensor op.
:::

:::
